8023.title: Call the Midwife
8023.description: Het is juli 1966 en Engeland is in de greep van de wereldbekerkoorts. In Nonnatus House worden vier nieuwe leerling-vroedvrouwen ontvangen. Een van hen, Nancy Corrigan, maakt meteen indruk. 4/7

11232.title: Call the Midwife
11232.description: A disease outbreak brings back bad memories for Patsy, while Sister Winifred is forced to reconsider her prejudices when dealing with a mother-to-be. Barbara faces a dilemma when Tom asks her to dinner.

11233.title: Call the Midwife
11233.description: The pressures of modern Britain reach Poplar as a hospital secondment and a difficult birth raise moral questions for Sister Julienne. Trixie and Tom help a family breaking apart under the pressure of a son's dreams for the future.

16309.title: Call the Midwife
16309.description: Valerie tries to help a struggling mother to accept her son's birth defect, and the Turners oversee a measles vaccination trial at the clinic. Meanwhile, Nurse Crane is determined to make the most of the Whitsun bank holiday.

28455.title: Call the Midwife
28455.description: Wanneer zuster Hilda afwezig is vanwege een opfriscursus, neemt zuster Julienne de huisbezoeken over. De nieuwe leerling-vroedvrouwen hebben hun plek gevonden en er heerst een gevoel van hoop. 5/7

47257.title: Call the Midwife
47257.description: With modern advances starting to change things for the better, even medical professionals like Dr Turner and Shelagh are forced to consider their own lifestyles. As they fight for better respiratory health for their patients, Timothy realises the risks his parents are running themselves by continuing to smoke.

47258.title: Call the Midwife
47258.description: A spate of violent attacks on women brings a state of fear to Poplar, and impacts directly on the residents of Nonnatus House. A secret pregnancy threatens the life of a young girl after her mother takes matters into her own hands. Meanwhile, a long overdue holiday for the Turner family fails to live up to expectations.

A secret pregnancy threatens the life of a young girl after her mother takes matters into her own hands. Meanwhile, a long overdue holiday for the Turner family fails to live up to expectations.

52215.title: Call the Midwife
52215.description: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

64183.title: Call the Midwife
64183.description: Zuster Frances behandelt een aanstaande moeder die gebukt gaat onder een groot psychisch trauma. Ondertussen voelt Trixie zich genoodzaakt om zich openlijk uit te spreken over een belangrijke kwestie.
